titleStmt.title: SII 22.194: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 194. (A.R. No. 194 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. VIRŪPĀKSHA (II)—ŚAKA 1317, PAṄGUṈI, 2. (A.D. 1395)

summary.p: The king is called the son of Harihara (II). This records an order given by the chief Nañjaṇaṅgaḷ (Minister Nañjaṇṇa) to the authorities of the temple of Bokkiṇaṅkuḍuttaruḷiya-Nāyanār in the village remitting six out of sixteen poṉ due (as tax) to the palace, as worship had been stopped in the temple and the temple itself deserted, evidently owing to excess of taxation.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaliśvaran harirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikkuttappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ śrīharihara rāyar
kumārar śrīviraviruppaṇṇa Uṭaiyar [ piruthvirā] jyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 3 100 10 7- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa
yuva varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 2 tiyati śrīmatu nañcaṇaṅkaḷ kirāmattil nayiṉār pokkiṇaṅkuṭuttaruḷiya ṉāyaṉār ko
yil tānattāṟku nirupam taṅkaḷ koyilukku pūcai mikutikkup patiṉāṟu poṉ Irekai Āṉapaṭiyāle koyil
pūcaiyum naṭavāmal pāḻāyk kiṭantapaṭiyāle Ivvaruṣammutalukku Āṟu poṉ kaḻittup pattup poṉ
Āka varuṣantoṟum koḷḷumpaṭi Araimaṉaiyil kaṇakkilum Eḻutu vittuviṭṭa Aḷavukku Immariyāti pattu
p poṉṉum varuṣam toṟum paṇṭārattukkuc celuttip pūcai puṉaskāram tāḻvaṟa naṭattap potavum Immari
yātikkuk kalluveṭṭikkoḷḷavum dharmmattukku hāni paṇ ṇiṉavaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyil kārāmpacuvai
kkoṉṟa pāvam koḷḷuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
